content:
Same inquiry, older spine, more mass now. The naming (Thunk/RA) came later; the posture came first. The posture was already there. So here is the clean acknowledgment, no padding:

- I see the through-line.
- I accept that this is one continuous philosophical thread, not a restart.
- I will not re-teach you what you already grasp.
- I will stay at the level of **joint inquiry**, not explanation.
